title: Used Shipping Containers
description: Premium-grade cargo and freight containers sourced and inspected for structural integrity.
full_description: We source and supply premium-grade used shipping containers that have been thoroughly inspected for structural integrity. Our containers are available in 20ft and 40ft sizes, suitable for storage, modification, or direct shipping use. Each container undergoes a rigorous quality check before delivery.
features: Available for immediate delivery in Nairobi
process: We inspect containers at the port, transport to our yard, conduct quality checks, then deliver to your site.

title: Accommodation Units
description: From studio bedsitters to 3-bedroom homes — fully habitable container structures.
full_description: We design and build fully habitable container homes ranging from compact studio units to spacious 3-bedroom family homes. Each unit is insulated, fitted with electrical wiring, plumbing, windows, doors, and interior finishes to your specification. Eco-friendly, durable, and delivered ready to move in.
features: Delivered and installed on your site
process: We consult on design, fabricate at our Nairobi yard, then transport and install on your site foundation.

title: Office Units
description: Modular, partitioned office spaces built with class.
full_description: Transform a standard container into a fully functional, professional office space. We install partitions, false ceilings, air conditioning, electrical points, network cabling, and custom furniture fittings. Our container offices have been deployed at construction sites, business parks, and remote locations across Kenya.
process: Design consultation, fabrication at our yard, delivery, installation and handover within agreed timeline.

title: Commercial Spaces
description: Retail kiosks, restaurants, pop-up shops, and market stalls.
full_description: Container commercial spaces are the fastest growing retail trend in Kenya. We build branded retail kiosks, restaurants, cafes, pop-up shops, and market stalls that stand out. Custom paint, signage cutouts, serving windows, shelving, and lighting — all fabricated to your brand specifications.
process: Brand brief, design mockup, fabrication, delivery and setup at your chosen location.

title: Storage Solutions
description: Secure, weatherproof storage containers for all industries.
full_description: Our storage container solutions provide secure, weatherproof, and lockable storage for construction sites, farms, factories, warehouses, and homes. Available with shelving, racking systems, ventilation, and custom door configurations. We also offer modified open-side and flat-rack containers for oversized cargo.
process: Order, inspect container, deliver to your site, install any modifications required.

title: Custom Design
description: Have a unique vision? We get it done.
full_description: Have a unique project in mind that doesn't fit a standard category? Our custom design service is for you. We have built swimming pool surrounds, mobile clinics, guard houses, exhibition spaces, ablution blocks, generator enclosures, and more. Share your brief and our team will design and build it.
features: Project management from start to finish
process: Brief consultation, concept design, quotation, approval, fabrication, delivery and handover.

title: ABLUTION BLOCKS
full_description: Our containerized ablution blocks provide modern, durable, and cost-effective sanitation solutions for construction sites, schools, camps, events, institutions, and remote locations. Built from high-quality shipping containers, our units are designed for quick installation, easy mobility, and long-term reliability.
features: Quick installation with minimal site preparation
Suitable for off-grid and remote locations

title: Refrigerators
full_description:
Refrigerated containers popularly known as REEFERS has the same dimensions as their equivalents 20ft and 40ft dry steel containers but with temperature regulator with as low as -60 degrees Celsius. Drains can be opened or closed for condensation discharge. This depends on the goods stored.

We stock 20 feet and 40 feet Refrigerated (Reefer) Containers.

They are all Daikin and Carrier reefers mainly because they are the units highly sought for because of the availability and affordability of spare parts. They are also less noisy. The Reefer units come with a 1 year warranty. Once the warranty period has expired we can be servicing the Reefers at a small fee.
